channel.title: Posts on Programming for the week
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Programming for the week

item.description: -Week 16- Monday A.) 5 Supersets Bench press: 12-8-4-8-12 reps 8 Barbell rows -Reps on the bench press will change for every set, reps on barbell rows stay the same on all five sets. B.) EMOM 15min Min 1: Box jumps 60/50cm Min 2: Pull-ups Min 3: Overhead split jumps 10/5kg (Weight plate) Min 4: Push-ups Min 5: Rest Tuesday A.) EMOM 10min Min 0-3: 3 Hang Snatch Min 4-6: 2 Hang Snatch
